summary: SEO Schema Testing Complete - All 10 features tested. Had to restart frontend server to fix stale index.html caching issue. After restart, all schemas render correctly. Homepage has 3 static schemas (LocalBusiness with hasOfferCatalog + 9 services, WebSite, BreadcrumbList). Service page /refrigerator-repair has 7 total schemas including FAQPage with 8 questions.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend server needed restart to pick up changes to public/index.html - hot reload may not apply to static HTML files
Multiple duplicate schemas exist (static in body + Helmet in head) - works for SEO but could be cleaned up
Service page LocalBusiness schema from ApplianceRepairPageNew.js has slightly different areaServed format (no containedInPlace) vs static index.html schema
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SEO schema tests pass. Frontend needed a restart (sudo supervisorctl restart frontend) to pick up index.html changes - this may be needed after any public/ folder edits.

test_results.homepage_no_fake_cities: PASS - Oakland, San Jose, Berkeley, Palo Alto not in areaServed
test_results.homepage_hasOfferCatalog: PASS - 9 services (Refrigerator, Washer, Dryer, Dishwasher, Oven & Range, Cooktop, Ice Maker, Wine Cooler, Garbage Disposal)
test_results.homepage_footer_contact: PASS - address 1549 Franklin Street, phone (760) 543-5733, hours Mon-Fri 8am-6pm
